name: S-45 (SS-156)
events: 5 Mar 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. I.C. Eddy) departed from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for Brisbane, Australia.
15 Apr 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. I.C. Eddy) arrived at Brisbane.
12 May 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. I.C. Eddy) departed from Brisbane for her 1st war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the Solomons.
19 Jun 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. I.C. Eddy) ended her 1st war patrol at Brisbane.
26 Aug 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. I.C. Eddy) departed from Brisbane for her 2nd war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the Solomons.
23 Sep 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. I.C. Eddy) ended her 2nd war patrol at Brisbane.
27 Oct 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) arrived in her patrol area in the Solomons for her 3rd war patrol.
6 Nov 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) departed from her patrol area to end her 3rd war patrol at Suva, Fiji.
1 Dec 1942 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) departed from Suva to proceed to the Panama Canal Zone.
6 Jan 1943 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) arrived at Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
16 Mar 1943 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN) departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
23 Mar 1943 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN) arrived at St. Thomas, Virgin Islands from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
25 Mar 1943 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN) departed St. Thomas, Virgin Islands for Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
31 Mar 1943 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN) arrived at Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone from St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
5 Apr 1943 USS S-45 transited the Panama Canal and arrived at Balboa.
19 Nov 1943 After an overhaul USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) departed from San Diego, California bound for Dutch Harbour, Alaska.
2 Dec 1943 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) arrived at Dutch Harbour, Alaska.
31 Dec 1943 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) departed from Dutch Harbour for her 4th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol off the Kurils.
28 Jan 1944 USS S-45 (Lt. R.H. Caldwell, Jr.) ended her 4th war patrol at Attu. She is now assigned to training duties.
